summary: Ticketing Configuration UI testing complete - Full Jira/ServiceNow integration config with auth-protected endpoints and masked credentials working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticketing config is stored per-tenant using key ticketing_config:{tenant_id}. The config masking preserves real tokens when masked values are sent back. Test connection makes real HTTP calls to Jira/ServiceNow APIs.

backend_api_tests.GET_providers: PASS - Returns jira and servicenow with required fields (base_url, email, api_token, project_key for Jira; instance_url, username, password, assignment_group for ServiceNow)
backend_api_tests.GET_config_masked: PASS - Returns masked credentials (api_token shows ••••XXXX format)
backend_api_tests.PUT_config_super_admin: PASS - Super admin can save config, returns masked response
backend_api_tests.PUT_config_preserves_token: PASS - Sending masked value (••••XXXX) preserves existing real token in database
backend_api_tests.POST_test_connection: PASS - Returns connection test result (simulation or real)
backend_api_tests.GET_stats: PASS - Returns ticket counts (total, open, in_progress, closed) and simulation_mode
backend_api_tests.GET_tickets: PASS - Returns ticket list with items and total count
backend_api_tests.config_tenant_id: PASS - Config includes tenant_id field for per-tenant isolation

frontend_ui_tests.connection_banner: PASS - Shows 'No ticketing provider configured' / 'Simulation Mode' / 'Live' based on config state
frontend_ui_tests.config_panel_visibility: PASS - Config panel visible for super_admin with 'Admin only' label
frontend_ui_tests.provider_cards: PASS - Jira and ServiceNow cards displayed with descriptions
frontend_ui_tests.credential_fields: PASS - All fields (base_url, email, api_token, project_key) with proper placeholders and help text
frontend_ui_tests.eye_toggle_secrets: PASS - Eye toggle works to show/hide api_token
frontend_ui_tests.save_button_states: PASS - Shows 'Save Configuration' when dirty, 'Saved' after save
frontend_ui_tests.test_connection_button: PASS - Test Connection button works, shows result (e.g., 'Jira auth failed: HTTP 401')
frontend_ui_tests.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Tickets, Open, In Progress, Closed, Mode (LIVE/SIM)
frontend_ui_tests.disconnect_button: PASS - Disconnect button visible when provider configured
